---
title: "dev_xcms"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{dev_xcms}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---



### plot_xcms_peaks_Chromatogram
1. the function 'plot_xcms_peaks_Chromatogram' get error, please test use: 
  - obj <- load_demo()
  - plot_xcms_peaks_Chromatogram(obj@xcmsData$NegativeMS1,1)
  and then locate the cause of error
